records.ety: [L., something to be remembered, neut. of memorandus, fut. pass. p. of memorare. See Memorable.]

defs: A record of something which it is desired to remember; a note to help the memory.
quotes: I . . . entered a memorandum in my pocketbook.
I wish you would, as opportunity offers, make memorandums of the regulations of the academies.

defs: A brief or informal note in writing of some transaction, or an outline of an intended instrument; an instrument drawn up in a brief and compendious form.
